response.step_by_step_log:
The video contains two separate performances. 
1. 00:00 - 02:37: La+ Darknesss performing '興味ないよ'. Searched using: '"興味ないよ" La+ Darknesss Japanese and English lyrics'. 
2. 02:37 - 02:57: Transition/Interlude. 
3. 02:57 - 05:00: Kazama Iroha performing 'ホントノワタシ'. Searched using: '"ホントノワタシ" Kazama Iroha Japanese and English lyrics'. 
Lyrics were successfully retrieved for both songs.
response.global_summary: A 2-song live performance video featuring members of Hololive. La+ Darknesss performs "Kyomi Nai Yo" from 00:00 to 02:37, followed by an interlude, and Kazama Iroha performs "Honto no Watashi" (cover) from 02:57 to 05:00.

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss performs on stage. Title '興味ないよ' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「キミが好き」って この感情に潰されてる
足りない脳はどちらの方か
どうでもいっか、もう
傷付いたって知らない様ね
責任逃れ
「私はなんで好きなんだ？」って問い出す流れ
最低なあなたへ
アタシ興味ないよ、キミなんて
マジ半端ないね
舐めた真似
ポップでキッチュなこの愛に
壊されりゃいい
ha-ha-ha-ha
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"I like you," I'm crushed by this feeling
Is my brain the one that's lacking?
Whatever, I guess
You don't seem to notice even if I'm hurt
Avoiding responsibility
"Why do I like you?"
The flow of questioning that
To you, who's the worst
I'm not interested, in you
You're really half-hearted
Such a sloppy imitation
I hope I get destroyed by this
Pop and kitschy love
Ha-ha-ha-ha

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs on stage. Title 'ホントノワタシ' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
本当の私 知らないくせに
分かったような笑顔見せないで
近くにいてもずっと一緒でも
理解もせずに内心うざがって
今日も無難に好かれるように
気づけばこんな嫌な奴になってた
本当の私を愛してくれる人はいるのかな？
ごめん 言えない 怖いよ 情けない
私の真実（ホント） 知っていてほしい
見た目だけじゃワカラナイ
ワタシのこと可愛いだけと
まさか思っていないよね？
ワタシの真実（ホント） 知っていてほしい
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even though you don't know the real me
Don't give me that look of understanding
Even if we're close, even if we're always together
Without even understanding, you're annoyed deep down
Trying to be liked safely again today
I realized I've become such an unpleasant person
I wonder if there's someone who will love the real me?
Sorry, I can't say it, I'm scared, I'm pathetic
I want to know the real me
You can't tell just by looking
You don't think I'm just cute, do you?
I want you to know my truth (real me)
